result.markdown: --- title: "Trajectory Analysis" subtitle: "Infer developmental pseudotime with Monocle3" categories: [scRNA-seq, Monocle3, Trajectory, Pseudotime] --- scRNA-seq · Chapter 07 ## Overview Trajectory analysis orders cells along a continuum of developmental states, assigning each cell a **pseudotime** value that reflects its progress along a biological process (differentiation, activation, cell cycle, etc.). **This chapter covers:** 1. Converting a Seurat object to a Monocle3 `cell_data_set` 2. Preprocessing and dimensionality reduction within Monocle3 3. Learning the principal graph 4. Setting the root node and computing pseudotime 5. Identifying genes that change along pseudotime --- ## Setup ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(Seurat) library(monocle3) library(ggplot2) library(patchwork) library(dplyr) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} seu <- readRDS("data/processed/seu_05_annotated.rds") ``` ::: --- ## Convert Seurat → Monocle3 `cell_data_set` ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Extract components from Seurat gene_metadata <- data.frame( gene_short_name = rownames(seu), row.names = rownames(seu) ) cds <- new_cell_data_set( expression_data = GetAssayData(seu, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts"), cell_metadata = seu@meta.data, gene_metadata = gene_metadata ) ``` ::: --- ## Preprocess and Reduce Dimensions ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} cds <- preprocess_cds(cds, num_dim = 30) cds <- reduce_dimension(cds, reduction_method = "UMAP") ``` ::: ::: {.callout-tip} ## Transfer UMAP coordinates from Seurat To keep your Seurat UMAP layout consistent with the trajectory plot, embed the Seurat UMAP coordinates directly into the Monocle3 object: ```r reducedDim(cds, type = "UMAP") <- Embeddings(seu, reduction = "umap") ``` ::: --- ## Cluster and Learn Graph ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} cds <- cluster_cells(cds, resolution = 1e-3) cds <- learn_graph( cds, use_partition = TRUE, close_loop = FALSE, learn_graph_control = list(minimal_branch_len = 5) ) plot_cells( cds, color_cells_by = "cell_type", label_groups_by_cluster = FALSE, label_leaves = TRUE, label_branch_points = TRUE ) ``` ::: --- ## Order Cells in Pseudotime ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Interactive root selection (run in RStudio, not on HPC) cds <- order_cells(cds) # --- OR set root programmatically --- # Identify the root node nearest to a known progenitor cluster root_cells <- rownames(subset(colData(cds), cell_type == "HSC")) cds <- order_cells(cds, root_cells = root_cells) plot_cells( cds, color_cells_by = "pseudotime", label_cell_groups = FALSE, label_leaves = FALSE, label_branch_points = FALSE, graph_label_size = 3 ) ``` ::: --- ## Identify Pseudotime-Dependent Genes ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Test all genes (computationally intensive — subset to HVGs if needed) pr_test <- graph_test(cds, neighbor_graph = "principal_graph", cores = 8) pr_deg <- pr_test %>% filter(q_value < 0.05) %>% arrange(desc(morans_I)) head(pr_deg, 20) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Group co-expressed genes into modules gene_module_df <- find_gene_modules( cds[rownames(pr_deg)[1:500], ], resolution = c(10^seq(-6, -1)) ) plot_cells( cds, genes = gene_module_df, label_cell_groups = FALSE, show_trajectory_graph = FALSE ) ``` ::: --- ## Save ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} saveRDS(cds, "data/processed/cds_07_trajectory.rds") # Add pseudotime back to Seurat object seu$pseudotime <- pseudotime(cds)[colnames(seu)] saveRDS(seu, "data/processed/seu_07_pseudotime.rds") ``` ::: --- ## Session Info ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} sessionInfo() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}
